---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for a trade, workflow, or command
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## problem

What estimating or bid-setup problem should this solve?

## trade or CSI scope

Which trade/profile does this affect?

## proposed behavior

Describe the output, command, profile rule, validator check, or document change you want.

## examples

Use fictional or sanitized examples only. Do not include proprietary bid documents, supplier
quotes, private estimates, customer files, or confidential project information.
